ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recreational_business_profits" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit record */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the recreational fishing business */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business operates */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the profit data */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure for the business */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the business */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source data supporting the profit record */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin calculated as (total_revenue - total_expenditure) / total_revenue */,
  "number_of_trips" INTEGER /* Number of trips conducted by the business */,
  "average_trip_revenue" REAL /* Average revenue per trip */,
  "average_trip_expenditure" REAL /* Average expenditure per trip */,
  "fish_species_targeted" TEXT /* Primary fish species targeted by the business */,
  "customer_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the customers (e.g., age, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recreational_business_profits_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES spatial_components ("location")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributional_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributional shift */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species affected by the shift */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the shift */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shift (e.g., state, region) */,
  "shift_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the shift (e.g., North, South, Inshore, Offshore) */,
  "shift_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the shift */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source data supporting the shift */,
  "shift_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the shift (e.g., climate change, overfishing) */,
  "ecological_impact" TEXT /* Summary of the ecological impact of the shift */,
  "economic_impact" TEXT /* Summary of the economic impact of the shift */,
  "scientific_reference" TEXT /* Reference to scientific studies supporting the shift */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the shift data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributional_shifts_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES spatial_components ("location")
)

CREATE TABLE "allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allocation record */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species for which the quota is allocated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the allocation */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector (e.g., recreational, commercial) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the allocation applies */,
  "quota" REAL /* Quota for the species and sector */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source data supporting the allocation */,
  "remaining_quota" REAL /* Remaining quota after allocation */,
  "quota_usage" REAL /* Percentage of the quota used */,
  "quota_adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for any adjustments to the quota */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review of the quota */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next review of the quota */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allocation_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES spatial_components ("location")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_components" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of spatial component (e.g., North/South, Inshore/Offshore) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the spatial component (e.g., state, region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spatial component */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source data supporting the spatial component */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the location */,
  "spatial_extent" REAL /* Extent of the spatial component (e.g., area in square kilometers) */,
  "ecological_zone" TEXT /* Ecological zone of the location (e.g., coastal, pelagic) */,
  "fishing_pressure" TEXT /* Level of fishing pressure in the area */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions (e.g., water temperature, salinity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id")
)
